title: The Straw Hats Are Cornered
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on the straw hats are cornered, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Straw Hats Are Cornered. Crocodile defeats Luffy and leaves him to die, while Vivi and the crew race toward the capital without their captain. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: The whole world!? How is that possible!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Whoa, this is getting too big for me...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmph, what the heck are you going on about?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't need another goddamn reason,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: to kick that bastard's ass!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So then... How do you plan to get out of here?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Oh crap! The water's already up to my thighs!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We're gonna die! We're all gonna die!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: NOO!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'm... starting to feel faint...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: No! Hang in there, Luffy! VIVI said she'll be back with help soon!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Vivi... It must be hard for you, what with so little time... Sorry for putting you through so much stress...

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Damn it! If only i were stronger, i could cut through this cage no problem...!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: "One should not make any loud noises while eating"...

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: Anti- manner Kick Course!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Whew...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: 'Sup.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Did I keep you waiting?

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: PRINCE!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Stop posing, and find the damn key already!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh thank god!

summary: This part develops the straw hats are cornered and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
